description_long: This convenience store is a single-story rectangular building with a flat roof and a modern, utilitarian design. The front facade features a combination of large glass doors, green and metallic service panels, and a small set of steps leading to an entrance. The exterior is primarily finished in shades of gray, with a blue accent band running along the top edge of the facade. The side and rear walls are plain, with minimal detailing and no visible windows or doors. The structure appears to be constructed from concrete or masonry, with metal and glass elements on the storefront, and is designed for easy access from the street.
description: A modern, single-story convenience store with a flat roof, glass doors, and a gray and blue facade.
description_view_0: Front view showing glass entrance doors, green and metallic service panels, and a blue accent band above.
description_view_1: Side view with plain gray wall and minimal detailing, no windows or doors visible.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a featureless gray wall and the flat roof extending across the building.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with a plain gray wall and no visible openings.
attribute_glass_entrance_doors: Yes, two large glass swinging doors with metal frames and visible handles, high transparency.
attribute_display_windows: Yes, large display windows integrated with the entrance doors, clear glass with metal framing, no visible advertisements.
